note: Rewrite overstates eligibility as only for Afib without valve disease and adds specific risks/symptoms not shown in original.
flagged_claims: This procedure is for people with Afib who do not have heart valve disease.
Problems can include bleeding, fluid around the heart, or a stroke.
The device could also move, or a clot could form on the device itself.
Call your doctor right away if you have chest pain or trouble breathing.
call if you feel dizzy or if you are bleeding where the tube went into your body.
guides it to your heart using X-rays and ultrasounds.
